name: semwitness
description: Proof-carrying shadow evaluation for semantic compression and typed intent normalization.

interface.shortDescription: Measure and verify semantic compression before using it.
interface.longDescription: SemWitness analyzes context, simulates deterministic compression, verifies proof bundles, evaluates typed intent normalizers, and measures evidence without claiming transparent interception or cache authorization.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this context for safe token savings with SemWitness.
Simulate compression and verify the resulting proof bundle.
Replay this fixture and compare its measured token cost.
Evaluate this intent normalizer offline in shadow mode.
